# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - deploy

variables:
  MR_TITLE: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
  MR_DESCRIPTION: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying feature: ${MR_TITLE}"
    - git add .
    - git commit -m "${MR_TITLE}: ${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
  only:
    variables: [MR_TITLE != ""]

deploy_tags:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deployment tags: ${CI_PROJECT_NAME} ${MR_TITLE}"
    - deploy-tag --create-release --release-name="${MR_TITLE}" --tag="v${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-feature/${MR_TITLE}"
  only:
    variables: [MR_TITLE != ""]
